statement: JSON import restore — Allow user to upload a JSON backup to restore/continue work, with validation — Affects import parser, validation layer, mapper layer, builder
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: User can recover work without asking technical team
